DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFFS YUANCHENG HE AND ZHAOYING TAN'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER RE DEFENDANT AMANDA M. LA'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, NOS. 36-140, IS GRANTED AND DENIED AS FOLLOWS. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO EXTEND THE TIME FOR PLAINTIFFS TO RESPOND TO THE DISCOVERY AT ISSUE BY 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. PREVAILING/MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 DIRECTLY TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT PETER.CATALANOTTI@WILSONELSER.COM. MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-10-2024 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-10-2024 Text Ruling

Plaintiffs Yuancheng He And Zhaoying Tan'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Re Defendant Amanda M. La'S Special Interrogatories, Set One, Nos. 36-140
Off Calendar Mar-22-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiffs Yuancheng He and Zhaoying Tan's Notice of Motion and Motion for Protective Order Re Defendant Amanda M. La's Special Interrogatories, Set One, Nos. 36-140, is GRANTED and DENIED as follows. The Court grants Plaintiff's request to extend the time for Plaintiffs to respond to the discovery at issue by 30 days of notice of this order. All requests for sanctions are denied.

Prevailing/Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 directly to the Judge Pro Tem at Peter.Catalanotti@wilsonelser.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2023 Set For Trial On Mar-25-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
